frontmatter.description: Sustained spike in 5xx responses from an upstream dependency

signature.embedding_seed: upstream 5xx spike server error gateway timeout

body:
## When this fires
The error rate from a named upstream has crossed the alert threshold. Could be the upstream itself, a transient network partition, or a payload our caller started sending that the upstream cannot handle.

## Playbook
1. Plot upstream-error-rate to see whether the spike is sustained or a single burst.
2. Read upstream-status for an active provider incident.
3. Inspect recent-deploys-upstream for changes that landed near the spike.

## Common confusion
This is *not* [[rate-limit-tripped]]: that fires on 429s, which signal quota, not failure.
